title: stachys × leucomalla
intro: Stachys × leucomalla, also known as the 'Silver Heart' or 'Hearts of Gold' plant, is a sterile hybrid of the Stachys byzantina and Stachys lanata species. This plant is known for its ornamental value, with its silvery-gray foliage and white, pink, or purple flowers that bloom in the summer months. The medicinal properties of Stachys × leucomalla include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming this plant include reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, alleviating menstrual cramps, and promoting relaxation.
